titulo: FUJIFILM 26230010 400/800GB LTO Ultrium 3 Tape Media 1 Pack
WD Black 5TB P10 Game Drive Portable External Hard Drive for PS5/PS4/Xbox One/PC/Mac USB 3.2 (WDBA3A0050BBK-WESN)
descripcion:
Enhanced gaming storage capacity of up to 5TB, accommodating over 125 games, ensuring ample space for both cherished classics and latest releases
Portable form factor with sleek metal top covering that provides fast access to your growing game storage
Speeds up to 140MB/s (2TB model) to push your console or PC to new levels
Compatible with Xbox Series X|S (play and store Xbox One games / archive Xbox Series X|S games) and PlayStation 5 (play and store PS4 games/archive PS5 games) consoles
Premium HDD with 3-year limited warranty, purpose-built for gamers based on WD_BLACK quality and reliability
